title: WHAT IS NEEDED FOR A REGRESSION SESSION?
subtitle: For an effective regression therapy session, it is important to ensure comfortable conditions and prepare properly

0.title: Time
0.description: Set aside 2-3 hours for a full session. This allows you not to rush and deeply work through your request.

1.title: Headphones
1.description: For online sessions, prepare comfortable headphones with a microphone for quality sound and communication.

2.title: Comfortable Place
2.description: Find a quiet place where no one will disturb you. Prepare a comfortable chair or bed for relaxation.

3.title: Stable Internet
3.description: For online sessions, ensure a stable internet connection to avoid interruptions during the session.

items.0: Refrain from consuming alcohol, caffeine, and heavy food 2-3 hours before the session
items.1: Wear comfortable clothing that does not restrict movement and breathing
items.2: Before the session, formulate your request or question you want to get an answer to
items.3: Be open to the process and trust your inner experience
